title: Agent Strategy Manager

Deployment / project execution: ran GTM, presale, ambassador programmes end-to-end across multiple workstreams
AI industry expertise: actively building AI agents with Claude Code, deep current AI context
Cross-functional work with product/eng: coordinated dev, marketing, ops at early-stage startup
Outstanding communication: PR (2M views), content (40K followers), keynotes/investor comms
gaps: No direct enterprise customer success / SaaS deployment management track record (customers like Avis, Cash App, Chime are large enterprises)

preferred_met: Thrives in fast-paced 0-1 environment laying groundwork for a new function
Polymath / generalist orientation matches Decagon's stated values

preferred_skills.calculation: 20 * (2/2) = 20 (no separate hard preferred list; full credit)

experience_fit.calculation: Mid-level 8 yrs vs 'Manager' role expecting some enterprise CS depth; strong generalist but enterprise-deployment depth partial

notes: Decagon: leading conversational AI agent platform (Avis, Cash App, Chime, Oura). Backed by a16z, Accel, Bain Capital Ventures, Coatue, Index Ventures. In-office London. Agentic AI = Ryan's top-choice category. Different role from prior-tracked Decagon Implementation Strategist.
